free_text: .NEUTRONS PRODUCED BY THE GEEL LINAC, OPERATED
WITH A 1 NS ELECTRON BURST AT 800 HZ REPETITION
RATE, 60 MICROAMP AVERAGE BEAM CURRENT AND 100
PLACED PERDENDICULAR TO THE NEUTRON DIRECTION.
THE RELATIVE NEUTRON FLUX WAS MEASURED AS
CAPTURE BY A GAS-FLOW IONIZATION CHAMBER PLACED
.THE SAMPLES CONSISTED OF METALLIC DISCS OF 8 CM
DIAMETER, ENRICHED TO 99.927 PERCENT IN NI-58.
.ONE DATUM POINT, GIVEN WITH EN=111.72 KEV, WAS
OMITTED AS IT IS PROBABLY A MISPRINT.

OMITTED AS IT IS PROBABLY A MISPRINT.
